candidates.message: Fix OrdMap::range including keys outside of requested range if end bound doesn't exist in tree.
candidates.description: path.push((self, index)) should be path.push((self, index - 1)). When end bound is not found in the btree, the range iterator included one extra key.
'if' should be 'while' — when size_table[target_idx] <= index, a single if was insufficient; needed to loop to find the correct child.

candidates.message: Fix bug occurring in sort on small sizes.
candidates.description: Variable 'equal_swap_side' was declared outside the loop but should be re-initialized inside each iteration. Caused stale state across loop iterations.

candidates.message: Fix logic error in Vector::ptr_eq & PartialEq
candidates.description: Missing parentheses in boolean expression: '&& (a && b) || c' was parsed as '(&& a && b) || c' due to precedence. Two identical sites (ptr_eq and PartialEq).

candidates.message: Fix incomplete eq implementation for single chunks.
candidates.description: For Single variant, cmp_chunk shortcut returned result directly without falling back to full iterator comparison when chunks didn't match.
PullUp (predecessor/successor) must be attempted before Steal. The original code tried to steal first, which corrupted the tree when the node wasn't small.

candidates.message: Fix bug in remove_index for OrdMap (#141)
candidates.description: Restructured the remove_index match arms: old code used is_leaf() checks with wrong logic for deciding between StealFrom and PullUp. New code handles (Some, None), (None, Some), (Some, Some) cases separately.

candidates.message: Add overflow check paths for some methods that overflow on trees that tall enough.
candidates.description: NODE_SIZE.pow(level) can overflow usize for very deep trees. Added checked_pow with fallback logic at 3 sites.

candidates.message: Fix quadratic worst case in quicksort for Vectors
candidates.description: Added randomized pivot selection to prevent O(n²) worst case. Changed function signature to accept RNG parameter.
Used checked_add for length arithmetic in Vector::append to prevent integer overflow. Multiple sites.

candidates.message: RRB size table: don't pop conditional on cfg(debug_assertions)
candidates.description: debug_assert_eq!(value, size_table.pop_front()) — the pop_front() side effect was only executed in debug builds. Split into separate let + debug_assert.
path_next and path_prev returned empty Vec when reaching end of a node, instead of backtracking up the tree to find the next/prev key.
Changed PullUp from pulling next-level item to pulling highest/lowest in subtree. Involved changing enum variant from usize to Boundary enum and restructuring removal logic.
